summary: Advanced Carbon Credit Methodology Engine testing completed. All 63 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend Calculator tab fully functional with 10 sector tabs, methodology dropdown, input fields, and calculation results display. All 40+ methodologies (CDM, VCS, Gold Standard, CAR, ACR, GCC) verified working.

issues: Console warnings about HTML hydration (<th> as child of <span>), minor issue in ProjectTable component

critical_code_review_comments: Minor HTML structure warning in ProjectTable.jsx - <span> wrapping <th> elements causes hydration warning but doesn't break functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Methodology Engine fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET /methodology-list (returns 40+ methodologies), GET /methodology-list/{sector} (filter by sector), POST /calculate/methodology (single methodology calculation), POST /calculate/batch (batch calculation), GET /data/grid-emission-factor (emission factors by country), GET /methodology-details/{code}, GET /methodology-inputs/{code}. Frontend Calculator tab at /carbon has: 10 sector tabs (ENERGY, FORESTRY, WASTE, AGRICULTURE, INDUSTRIAL, TRANSPORT, BUILDINGS, HOUSEHOLD, MINING, BLUE_CARBON), methodology dropdown per sector, input fields for each methodology, Calculate Credits button, Reset to Defaults button, Calculation Results card showing Annual Emission Reductions, Baseline/Project Emissions, and methodology-specific outputs like yearly projections for forestry.
passed_tests: TestMethodologyBySector::test_invalid_sector_returns_empty - empty list with valid sectors message

TestAllMethodologyCalculations - 29 methodologies tested: ACM0001, ACM0002, ACM0005, ACM0006, ACM0007, ACM0009, ACM0010, ACM0012, ACM0014, ACM0022, AMS-I.A, AMS-I.D, AMS-II.D, AMS-II.G, AMS-III.B, AR-ACM0003, VM0008, VM0022, VM0033, VM0042, VM0044, VM0047, VM0048, TPDDTEC, MMECD, CAR-Landfill, CAR-Forest, ACR-IFM, GCCM001
4 KPI cards present: Total Annual Credits, Risk-Adjusted Credits, Quality Score, 10-Year NPV
5 tabs visible: Overview, Calculator, Projects, Scenarios, Map
Methodology Calculator component loads with data-testid='methodology-calculator'
10 sector tabs visible: ENERGY, FORESTRY, WASTE, AGRICULTURE, INDUSTRIAL, TRANSPORT, BUILDINGS, HOUSEHOLD, MINING, BLUE_CARBON
Sector tabs have data-testid='sector-tab-{sector}' for all sectors
ACM0002 calculation shows: Annual Emission Reductions = 157,286 tCO2e
AR-ACM0003 calculation shows: 12,237 tCO2e/year, 367,101 total credits, yearly projections table
Input fields modifiable - changed 150 MW to 200 MW and got 209,714 tCO2e
Calculation results display: methodology name, version, sector, emission reductions, unit
Baseline Emissions and Project Emissions cards visible
verified_methodologies_count: 40+ methodologies across CDM ACM (13), CDM AMS (10), CDM AM (2), CDM AR (1), VCS (7), Gold Standard (3), CAR (2), ACR (1), GCC (1)
